_comment: Pilot expansion: NHL 25 / eashl_3v3. Hand-keyed best-effort read from research/Previous_NHL_Stats/NHL_25/club_stats__eashl_3v3__01.png and __02.png. games_played math-confirmed at 111 (goals_for/avg_goals_for = 380/3.42, goals_against/avg_goals_against = 331/2.98 — both yield 111). 3v3 mode shows penalty_minutes=0 across the board, so power-play / shorthanded fields are omitted (they don't apply to this playlist) rather than coerced to zero. Metrics visible on-screen but not yet typed in the schema (shutouts, penalty_shot_goals, faceoffs_lost, breakaway_goals, one_timer_goals) are preserved in rawExtract for traceability — schema expansion is intentionally out of scope for this pilot.

records.notes: Pilot — hand-keyed best-effort. games_played derived from arithmetic (380/3.42 = 331/2.98 = 111). 3v3 mode has no power-play stats so power_*/times_shorthanded/short_handed_* are intentionally omitted (null) rather than zero. On-screen 'Win Differential = 13', 'Faceoffs Lost = 787', 'Breakaway Goals = 38', 'Penalty Shot Goals = 31', 'Shutouts = 15' captured in rawExtract; not yet promoted to typed columns.
